target.name: Dominion Dynamics
target.founder: Eliot Pence (CEO, led Anduril International 2018-2022), Mitch Carkner (COO, ex-CEO Decisive, ex-Amazon/IBM, Canadian Forces vet)

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $18M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Dominion Dynamics is a seed-stage defense and security company founded by Eliot Pence (formerly leading Anduril International 2018–2022) and Mitch Carkner (ex-CEO Decisive, Amazon/IBM, Canadian Forces veteran). The company has raised $18M to date. The Defense & Security sector comprises 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers including Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems.

The stage-progression method is applicable and yields a $45M implied valuation. Using $18M in total capital raised as a proxy for current value and applying a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage progression, this method indicates $45M. The peer-median approach is not applicable: while 19 same-sector peers exist, the narrow filters for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-tier companies yielded insufficient datapoints (fewer than 3 required for statistical reliability). Median comparable valuations across broader Defense & Security would introduce unacceptable selection bias.

The triangulated valuation range is $38M (low) to $52M (high), with a median of $45M. This reflects the single applicable method. Key uncertainties stem from the limited comparable dataset within the narrow seed-stage defense subsector and the reliance on a stage-progression heuristic rather than direct peer valuation evidence. The founder pedigree and management depth support credibility, but commercial traction metrics and revenue data would significantly refine this range.
